1.title: Too Big to Depeg
1.text: Tether commands more stablecoin market cap than the next four competitors combined, backed by a reserve that is mostly U.S. Treasuries and reverse repos. Deployed natively across dozens of chains with the deepest DEX liquidity of any stablecoin, USDT's infrastructure moat runs as deep as its capital reserves. The peg for most holders is maintained by arbitrageurs rather than a personal right to redeem.
